_meta.purpose: Govern all lending activity of CreditMind Capital Fund I. All agents, analysts, and IC members must operate within these parameters. Exceptions require written IC approval and must be documented in the credit memo.

fund_mandate.strategy: Senior secured direct lending to US middle-market companies
fund_mandate.international: Prohibited without unanimous IC approval. No EM or frontier market exposure.
primary_instruments: Revolving credit facilities (alongside term loans only)
permitted_with_ic_waiver: Second lien term loans (max 10% of portfolio)
Bridge loans (max 5% of portfolio, 18-month max term)
prohibited_instruments: Equity investments (warrants permitted as kicker only, not primary return driver)
Project finance / infrastructure debt (requires separate fund mandate)
Convertible notes to non-sponsored companies without IC approval

target_borrower_profile.ownership: PE-sponsored preferred. Non-sponsored permitted up to 20% of portfolio.
target_borrower_profile.employee_count: No minimum. Large headcount reductions in diligence period are a watch flag.
target_borrower_profile.business_age: Minimum 3 years operating history. Pre-revenue companies prohibited.
target_borrower_profile.profitability: EBITDA positive required at close. Negative EBITDA permitted only for distressed / rescue finance with IC approval.
target_borrower_profile.sponsor_standards: Institutional PE sponsors preferred. Independent sponsors permitted with enhanced DD. First-time funds require unanimous IC approval.

senior_secured.security: First priority lien on all assets including IP, receivables, and equity of all subsidiaries

unitranche.notes: First-out/last-out split permitted. AAL required if selling FO tranche to third party.

growth_capital.notes: Key-man clause mandatory. Equity warrant required (minimum 2% fully diluted). Tighter covenants than sponsored deals.

mezzanine.notes: EV analysis required. Recovery must exceed mezz amount in base case. PIK toggle permitted. Equity warrant required.

revolver.notes: Revolvers permitted only alongside term loan facilities. Standalone ABL requires IC waiver. Borrowing base certificate required monthly.

bridge.notes: Exit analysis mandatory. Exit milestones required in credit agreement. Break fee minimum 1%. One extension option only.

distressed.notes: Forensic DD required. Recovery analysis mandatory. External restructuring advisor review required for loans > $50M. Cash dominion required.

concentration_limits._note: All limits measured as % of total fund NAV (committed capital). Breaches require IC approval before close.

single_sponsor.note: Includes all deals with same PE firm

non_sponsored.note: All growth capital + founder-owned deals combined

pik_non_cash_pay.note: Any deal where interest can be PIK

floating_rate.note: Minimum 80% of portfolio must be floating rate

prohibited_investments._note: The fund will not lend to any entity in these categories under any circumstances without unanimous IC vote and LP advisory board notification.
sectors: Coal mining and coal-fired power generation
company_conditions: Active SEC investigation or DOJ criminal proceeding
Sanctions — OFAC SDN list or any subsidiary thereof
Active material litigation exceeding 20% of loan value with adverse ruling likely
Negative stockholders equity without clear path to recovery
Management team with prior fraud conviction
Known material ESG violation under active regulatory review
structural: Third lien or lower in capital structure
Lending to a fund or financial holding company (not operating company)
Non-US borrower without substantial US operations and US-law governed credit agreement
SPV with no recourse to operating entity (project finance — separate mandate required)

minimum_underwriting_standards._note: All conditions below must be met or documented as waived by IC before commitment.
financial_documentation: 3 years audited financial statements (2 years for companies < 5 years old)
Most recent interim financials no older than 90 days at close
Quality of Earnings report from Big 4 or recognized advisory firm for deals > $50M
Detailed EBITDA bridge from reported to adjusted
legal_documentation: Corporate structure chart with all entities
Copies of all existing debt agreements and intercreditor agreements
Material contracts review (top 3 customers, top 3 suppliers, key leases)
operational_diligence: Management presentation and Q&A (in-person for deals > $75M)
Reference checks on CEO and CFO
Background checks on all C-suite officers
financial_tests_at_close: Leverage at close must not exceed loan type maximum
DSCR at close must meet loan type minimum
Minimum unrestricted liquidity of 3 months operating expenses
No material adverse change since start of diligence

approval_authority_matrix._note: Approval authority is determined by total committed loan amount (not drawn). Waiver of any credit policy term requires one level above standard approval.

levels.role: Can approve deals ≤ $25M with MD co-sign. Routine follow-on commitments only.
Can approve deals ≤ $75M solo. Standard mid-market direct lending.
Required for all deals $75M–$200M. Standard IC vote.
Required for deals $200M–$350M, any concentration limit waiver, any prohibited investment waiver.
Required for deals > $350M, any deal that breaches hard concentration limits, any international deal, any project finance deal.

watch_list_criteria._note: A deal meeting ANY of the following criteria must be placed on the Watch List within 2 business days of trigger. Watch list deals receive monthly monitoring vs. standard quarterly.

automatic_triggers.action: Watch list + IC notification within 2 business days
Watch list + IC review within 5 business days
Watch list + MD notification within 1 business day
Watch list + IC approval required for waiver
Sector watch — enhanced monitoring for all sector deals

watch_list_criteria.removal_criteria: Deal may be removed from watch list when all trigger conditions are resolved and risk score returns below 60. Removal requires MD approval.

covenant_standards._note: Minimum covenant package by loan type. Agents may recommend tighter covenants based on deal specifics but may not recommend looser than these minimums without IC waiver.

minimum_financial_covenants.max_net_leverage: Closing leverage + 0.50x maximum step-up. Must step down to closing leverage by year 3.
minimum_financial_covenants.min_interest_coverage: Per loan type minimums. No waiver below 1.50x for any loan type.
minimum_financial_covenants.min_liquidity: Greater of $5M or 3 months of cash operating expenses.
minimum_financial_covenants.capex_limit: Required for all deals. Maximum = prior year capex + 20% growth allowance.
minimum_financial_covenants.restricted_payments: No distributions unless leverage ≤ closing leverage and no covenant breach.

reporting_covenants: Monthly management accounts within 30 days of month-end
Quarterly financial statements within 45 days of quarter-end
Annual audited financial statements within 90 days of fiscal year-end
Annual budget delivered 30 days before fiscal year start
Prompt notification of material events (litigation, management change, regulatory action)

esg_policy.framework: CreditMind Capital is a signatory to the UN Principles for Responsible Investment (PRI).
esg_policy.screening: ESG screening required for all deals > $75M. Dedicated ESG section in IC memo.
soft_flags: High carbon intensity industries (energy, materials, industrials) — ESG risk section required
Companies with > 500 employees — labor practices review
Food & agriculture — supply chain and land use review
Healthcare — patient safety and pricing practices review
esg_policy.reporting: Annual ESG report to LPs. Portfolio carbon footprint disclosed annually.

conflict_of_interest.gp_co_investment: GP principals may co-invest in deals alongside the fund at the same terms. Minimum $500K co-investment required for deals where GP principal sits on borrower board.
conflict_of_interest.related_party: Lending to any entity in which a GP principal holds equity requires LP advisory board approval and independent IC member vote.
conflict_of_interest.broker_dealer: No brokerage commissions paid to GP principals or affiliates on portfolio company transactions.
conflict_of_interest.information_barrier: Fund personnel with access to material non-public information may not trade public securities of related issuers.

risk_rating_scale._note: CreditMind internal rating scale. Mapped to equivalent public ratings for LP reporting.

ratings.description: Good quality. Moderate credit risk. Standard mid-market.
Adequate quality. Some credit risk. Enhanced monitoring.
Acceptable quality. Elevated risk. Tight covenants required.
Weak quality. High risk. Watch list consideration.
Speculative. Very high risk. IC review required.
Distressed or in default. Workout / recovery mode.

portfolio_construction_targets._note: Target portfolio composition at full deployment. Deviations > 10% require IC review.

by_rating.C_plus_and_below: 10-20% of NAV — higher yield, higher risk
